nasb.text: For the Lord saw the affliction of Israel, which was very bitter; for there was neither bond nor free, nor was there any helper for Israel.

esv.text: For the Lord  saw that the affliction of Israel was very bitter, for there was none left, bond or free, and there was none to help Israel.

cnv.text: 因為耶和華看見以色列十分艱苦，無論是自由的或為奴的都沒有了，也沒有幫助以色列的。

ccb.text: 因为耶和华看见以色列人，无论自由人还是奴隶都十分痛苦，没有人帮助他们。
